candidate_title: Propose issue-only PM backlog expansion model
issue_body:
Created by Hermes PM Checkpoint 11.

This issue was generated from selected backlog candidate pm8-002.

Scope is issue-only PM backlog modeling.

No labels, projects, comments, PRs, workflows, runners, deploys, runtime actions, branch-writer actions, financial actions, broker/trading actions, or secret access were approved.

The Operator should review whether this issue-only backlog model is the correct next PM governance step.
